name: volumio-stream-watchdog
description: Automatically switches to a local playlist when your stream fails, and resumes when it returns.
author: josemathias

volumio_info.details: Monitors your web radio or streaming source and automatically switches to a curated local Volumio playlist when the stream fails. Uses Volumio's own player state events and direct HTTP stream probing — not a generic TCP ping — so it catches failures that network checks miss. Resumes the original stream automatically when connectivity is restored.
